title: Use Python stdlib for mem-beads CLI
summary: Python 3.11 in Docker env, zero external deps
Stdlib handles ULID generation, JSON, file locking, argparse

title: mem-beads CLI Feature 1 complete
summary: 8 commands working: create, query, link, close, compact, uncompact, stats, rebuild-index
All tests passing with JSONL storage in .mem-beads/

title: OpenClaw has no per-turn hook for sub-agents
summary: Per-turn bead writing must be inline by main agent
Pre-compaction memory flush is the session-end hook
